languages.text: "Это... довольно необыкновенная симптоматика, Ваша Светлость". {n}Взгляд манипулуса пытливо изучает ваше лицо.{/n} "Похоже, часть благословенных аугментов в вашем теле подверглась некоей чужеродной инвазии. Гальваническая терапия должна помочь крупицам Истинной Плоти, коими вы одарены, справиться со скверной".

"That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."
languages.original_text: "Это... довольно необыкновенная симптоматика, Ваша Светлость". {n}Взгляд манипулуса пытливо изучает ваше лицо.{/n} "Похоже, часть благословенных аугментов в вашем теле подверглась некоей чужеродной инвазии. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

"That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

languages.text: «Es una sintomatología bastante... inusual, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El manipulus escudriña tu rostro con suma curiosidad.{/n} «Parece que algunos de los benditos aumentos de su cuerpo se han visto sometidos a algún tipo de invasión foránea. Una buena dosis de terapia galvánica debería estimular la poca verdadera carne con que ha sido {mf|agraciado|agraciada} para imponerse a la corrupción».
languages.original_text: "That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

traits.locale_text: «Es una sintomatología bastante... inusual, mi{mf|lord|lady}». {n}El manipulus escudriña tu rostro con suma curiosidad.{/n} «Parece que algunos de los benditos aumentos de su cuerpo se han visto sometidos a algún tipo de invasión foránea. Una buena dosis de terapia galvánica debería estimular la poca verdadera carne con que ha sido {mf|agraciado|agraciada} para imponerse a la corrupción».

languages.text: “这……这症状倒是不太寻常，大人。”{n}操纵者满怀好奇地打量着你的脸。{/n}“看来，您体内的一些神圣植入物，似乎遭到了某种外来入侵。采用电激疗法，应该能帮助您那所剩不多的神圣实肉战胜这种腐化。”
languages.original_text: "That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

traits.locale_text: “这……这症状倒是不太寻常，大人。”{n}操纵者满怀好奇地打量着你的脸。{/n}“看来，您体内的一些神圣植入物，似乎遭到了某种外来入侵。采用电激疗法，应该能帮助您那所剩不多的神圣实肉战胜这种腐化。”

languages.text: « Voilà une... symptomatologie bien peu commune, Votre Seigneurie. »{n}Le manipulus fixe votre visage d'un air curieux.{/n} « Il semble qu'une partie des augmentations sacrées dans votre corps aient été soumises à un genre d'invasion étrangère. La thérapie galvanique devrait aider le peu de chair véritable qui vous a été donné à éliminer la corruption. »
languages.original_text: "That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

traits.locale_text: « Voilà une... symptomatologie bien peu commune, Votre Seigneurie. »{n}Le manipulus fixe votre visage d'un air curieux.{/n} « Il semble qu'une partie des augmentations sacrées dans votre corps aient été soumises à un genre d'invasion étrangère. La thérapie galvanique devrait aider le peu de chair véritable qui vous a été donné à éliminer la corruption. »

languages.text: "Bu... Oldukça sıra dışı bir semptomatoloji {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Manipülus, büyük bir merakla yüzünü inceliyor.{/n} "Görünüşe göre vücudunuzdaki kutsanmış ogmentasyonların bazıları bir tür dış istilaya maruz kalmış. Galvaniz terapi, size bahşedilmiş az miktardaki Salt Suret'in bu yozlaşmanın üstesinden gelmesine yardımcı olacaktır."
languages.original_text: "That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

traits.locale_text: "Bu... Oldukça sıra dışı bir semptomatoloji {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri." {n}Manipülus, büyük bir merakla yüzünü inceliyor.{/n} "Görünüşe göre vücudunuzdaki kutsanmış ogmentasyonların bazıları bir tür dış istilaya maruz kalmış. Galvaniz terapi, size bahşedilmiş az miktardaki Salt Suret'in bu yozlaşmanın üstesinden gelmesine yardımcı olacaktır."

languages.text: 「それは……いささか珍しい症候ですね、{mf|閣下|閣下}」{n}マニピュルスは鋭い好奇心であなたの顔を観察した。{/n}「あなたの身体に施された聖なるオーグメティックのいくつかが、何らかの外的侵襲を受けているようです。ガルヴァニック療法が、あなたに授けられたわずかな真の肉体が腐敗を克服する助けとなるはずです」
languages.original_text: "That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."

traits.locale_text: 「それは……いささか珍しい症候ですね、{mf|閣下|閣下}」{n}マニピュルスは鋭い好奇心であなたの顔を観察した。{/n}「あなたの身体に施された聖なるオーグメティックのいくつかが、何らかの外的侵襲を受けているようです。ガルヴァニック療法が、あなたに授けられたわずかな真の肉体が腐敗を克服する助けとなるはずです」

languages.text: "Das ist eine ... recht ungewöhnliche Symptomatik, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}." {n}Der Manipulus studiert dein Gesicht mit offener Neugier.{/n} "Mir scheint, einige der gesegneten Augmentationen in Eurem Körper waren das Ziel einer fremden Invasion. Eine galvanische Therapie sollte dem Quentchen wahrem Fleisch, das Euch gewährt wurde, helfen, die Verderbnis zu überwinden."
languages.original_text: "That is... a rather unusual symptomatology, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}." {n}The Manipulus studies your face with keen curiosity.{/n} "It seems that some of the blessed augments in your body have been subject to some kind of foreign invasion. Galvanic therapy should help the modicum of True Flesh with which you have been gifted to overcome the corruption."
